'''''Star Wars'' 0''' was a comic book published by [[Dark Horse Comics]], with two versions released exclusively for two companies: [[American Entertainment]] and [[AnotherUniverse.com]]. The comic collected the story ''[[The Keeper's World]]'', originally serialized in ''[[Pizzazz]]'' from [[Marvel Comics]].

The two versions had different covers: one using [[Brian Stelfreeze]]'s [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]] art from the ''Star Wars Galaxy'' trading card set, and the other by [[Dave Dorman]].
